title: Arbiter of Efficiency
description: The Arbiter reviews the party's file in the foreman's office above the manufactory floor. Output is below standard. Demonstrate value.

steps.text: The foreman's office overlooked the entire manufactory floor through a single long window of thick, smudged glass. Inside, the Arbiter of Efficiency stood at a drafting table covered in charts showing output against target, deviation against acceptable range, time against cost. Every chart showed a gap. The Arbiter was studying the gap.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Efficiency
lines.text: Your output is below standard. You have defeated two wardens and one arbiter. Against projected resistance curves, this is adequate. Against optimal baseline, it is not.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Efficiency
lines.text: By prior parties. The ones who progressed further than you have. Their data forms the benchmark.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: How many prior parties made it this far?

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: You're measuring us against a hypothetical.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Efficiency
lines.text: All baselines are hypotheticals until data confirms them. The purpose of this encounter is to generate that data. Demonstrate value or be reassigned.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Efficiency
lines.text: I haven't determined that yet. I'll know after I see what you do next.
